description: Use this API to modify the status and/or metered end designation of an existing multi-section line grouping in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Multi-Section Line Grouping Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = multi_section_line_edit(ibus, jbus, id, intgar)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus number of from bus. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: Bus number of to bus. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Multi-section line identifier; id(1:1) must be ‘&’. (input; ‘&1’ by default).

intgar.description: METBUS, metered end bus number (must be IBUS or JBUS) (unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: multi-section line identifier is more than two characters.
multi-section line identifier does not start with &
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - invalid metered end bus. - invalid branch status.
